definition.vector_position_0: baseline MLP trained from scratch with all columns
definition.vector_position_k: MLP trained from scratch after removing k groups (worst to best) according to ranking
definition.removal: columns are removed from X_train/X_val, so input_dim changes each step

sensors.weights.elimination_order_rule: worst_to_best (reverse of ranking list, where rank 1 is best)

sensors.randomavg.elimination_order_rule: worst_to_best (reverse of ranking list, where rank 1 is best)

sensors.timetrust.elimination_order_rule: worst_to_best (reverse of ranking list, where rank 1 is best)

windows.weights.elimination_order_rule: worst_to_best (reverse of ranking list, where rank 1 is best)

windows.timetrust.elimination_order_rule: worst_to_best (reverse of ranking list, where rank 1 is best)
